title: galega officinalis var. africana
intro: Galega officinalis var. africana, also known as African galega or African goat's rue, is a perennial legume native to sub-Saharan Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The health benefits of African galega include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of malaria and other diseases. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
